title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 162.065 - Bus driver training required
text:
162.065.  Bus driver training required. — On an annual basis, each school district shall provide training in at least eight hours of duration to each school bus driver employed by the school district or under contract with the school district.  Such training shall provide special instruction in school bus driving.
(L. 2005 H.B. 487 § 2)
